description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, clean-lined design. The exterior is primarily white with gray roofing and trim, complemented by green lawn areas and wooden decking. The front facade includes large windows and a main entrance, while the rear opens to a spacious wooden patio with a covered seating area. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and there are distinct zones for grass, decking, and paved surfaces. The roof is a combination of gable and flat sections, giving the structure a contemporary look. The arrangement of windows and doors is asymmetrical, providing visual interest and maximizing natural light.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with gray roofing, green lawns, and a spacious wooden patio, enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a small lawn bordered by a paved area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, fenced perimeter, and the transition from grass to wooden deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden patio, covered seating area, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the patio cover, side lawn, and the mix of roof shapes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
